We could produce a kernel that does the full loop inside? That would be complex with DMA. Better to follow the pattern: one kernel call per time step, or a kernel that processes all T steps? We'll design a kernel that takes x[T,B,I], h0[B,H], w_i2h[H,K], b_i2h[H], w_h2o[O,H], b_h2o[O] and produces y[T,B,O].
